name: Peking Duck
description: Crispy roast duck served with thin pancakes, spring onions, and sweet bean sauce.

name: Sushi Platter
description: Assorted nigiri and maki rolls with fresh salmon, tuna, and shrimp.

name: Margherita Pizza
description: Classic pizza with San Marzano tomatoes, fresh mozzarella, and basil.

name: Tom Yum Goong
description: Spicy and sour shrimp soup with lemongrass, galangal, and lime leaves.

name: Matcha Layer Cake
description: Delicate layered sponge cake with premium matcha cream and a dusting of green tea powder.

name: Pad Thai
description: Stir-fried rice noodles with shrimp, tofu, peanuts, bean sprouts, and tamarind sauce.

name: Croissant
description: Buttery, flaky viennoiserie pastry made with layered yeast-leavened dough.

name: Tacos al Pastor
description: Corn tortillas filled with spit-grilled pork, pineapple, onion, and cilantro.

name: Bibimbap
description: Mixed rice bowl with sautéed vegetables, gochujang paste, and a fried egg on top.

name: Gelato
description: Rich and creamy Italian-style ice cream made with fresh milk, sugar, and natural flavors.
